mapper.select: SELECT brand_id, brand_name AS boardName, brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo, brand_slug AS brandSlug, is_domestic AS isDomestic FROM brand

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like al WHERE al.article_id = a.article_id) AS likeCount, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a LEFT JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE a.brand_id = #{brandId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like al WHERE al.article_id = a.article_id) AS likeCount, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE b.brand_slug = #{brandSlug} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, a.content, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a LEFT JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE a.article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article(user_id, title, content, test_drive_available, brand_id, board_name) VALUES(#{board.userId}, #{board.title}, #{board.content}, #{board.testDriveAvailable}, #{board.brandId}, #{board.boardName})
mapper.select: SELECT image_url FROM article_img WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY display_order, article_img_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_img(article_id, image_url, display_order) VALUES(#{articleId}, #{imageUrl}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE cl FROM comment_like cl JOIN comment c ON cl.comment_id = c.comment_id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO article_like(article_id, user_id) VALUES(#{articleId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a LEFT JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a JOIN article_like al ON al.article_id = a.article_id LEFT JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.article_id AS articleId, a.user_id AS userId, a.title, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.test_drive_available AS testDriveAvailable, a.view_cnt AS viewCnt, a.brand_id AS brandId, COALESCE(b.brand_name, a.board_name) AS boardName, b.brand_name_ko AS boardNameKo FROM article a LEFT JOIN brand b ON a.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE a.article_id IN (SELECT c.article_id FROM comment c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
